render_style_lock: STYLE LOCK: Period gothic live-action; candlelight and deep shadows; desaturated cool-brown palette; 19th-century domestic interiors; naturalistic skin and fabric texture; no modern clothing or lighting.
performance_lock: PERFORMANCE LOCK: First-person confessional adaptation—THE NARRATOR often faces and addresses the implied listener/camera when recounting; flashback scenes are objective staging where characters look at each other and scene action, not the viewer. Officers remain calm, civil, observational.

Character_Narrator.description: Lean man of middle years (roughly 35–50), pale sallow skin, dark disordered medium-length hair, intense bright eyes, hollow cheeks, thin lips; plain dark waistcoat over white shirtsleeves, dark period trousers.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult male, middle years; mid-to-higher pitch under strain; precise, controlled pace that can turn eager, fluent, then frantic; nervous energy held under forced calm; same voice on-camera and in V.O.
Character_Narrator.visual_lock: Same lean pale face, dark disordered hair, and intense bright eyes in every scene; plain dark waistcoat, white shirtsleeves, and dark period trousers as default look; never elderly, never white-haired; distinct from the frail Old Man and the uniformed officers.
Character_Narrator.performance_notes: In bare-room framing, direct address to camera/listener; in bedchamber flashbacks, plays against the Old Man and officers; composure cracks into raving only at the climax.

Character_OldMan.description: Frail elderly man, thin build, white hair, aged lined face; one pale dull-blue eye with a filmy veil, the other ordinary; wears a simple pale nightshirt.
Character_OldMan.voice_profile: Elderly male; thin, weak, low volume; brief startled cry and murmured replies; slow, fragile energy.
Character_OldMan.visual_lock: Constant white hair, frail elderly frame, and the signature pale blue filmed eye that must not drift; pale simple nightshirt as default garment; never middle-aged or dark-haired; clearly older and weaker than the Narrator.
Character_OldMan.performance_notes: Looks toward door/darkness and the Narrator, not the camera; terror and listening stillness more than speech.

Character_OfficerReynolds.description: Adult man, solid competent build, clean period grooming; dark 19th-century civil officer’s coat, badge, civil hat; composed face distinct from the Narrator’s pale disordered look.
Character_OfficerReynolds.voice_profile: Adult male; medium pitch; even, civil, official pace; polite authority without aggression.
Character_OfficerReynolds.visual_lock: Same dark period coat, badge, and civil hat; steady composed face; lead officer look among the three; never pale disordered like the Narrator, never elderly frail like the Old Man.
Character_OfficerReynolds.performance_notes: Addresses the Narrator and fellow officers; professional search demeanor; remains pleasantly chatty until the final spring-up.

Character_OfficerHale.description: Adult man, medium build, period facial hair or clean-shaven but distinct from Reynolds and Briggs; dark period officer coat, badge, civil hat.
Character_OfficerHale.voice_profile: Adult male; medium-low pitch; spare speech, calm energy; same civil register as the other officers.
Character_OfficerHale.visual_lock: Dark period coat and badge consistent with the other officers; face clearly different from Reynolds and Briggs (separate bone structure/hair); calm composed expression.
Character_OfficerHale.performance_notes: Primarily observational; exchanges mild glances with Briggs; does not address camera.

Character_OfficerBriggs.description: Adult man, sturdy build, distinct face from Reynolds and Hale (different hairline/features); dark period officer coat, badge, civil hat.
Character_OfficerBriggs.voice_profile: Adult male; medium pitch; minimal lines if any; steady, unhurried civil energy.
Character_OfficerBriggs.visual_lock: Matching dark period officer wardrobe; uniquely recognizable face among the three officers; composed civil expression.
Character_OfficerBriggs.performance_notes: Works the search with Hale; pleasant chat and smiles; springs up with the others at the confession.
